# Houston Center SBDC - Houston Local Routing for Houston/77084

## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing
Houston Center SBDC - Houston is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. Primary Houston metro SBDC hub. Verify service-area fit for 77084 because some pages distinguish Southwest Harris.

## Service area
Central and North Harris County

## Contact
- Address: 1455 West Loop South, Suite 900, Houston, TX 77027
- Phone: 713-752-8400
- Email: sbdcmetro@uh.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use the SBA ZIP locator as the official entry point.
- Ask for the user's business address ZIP/county before final office routing.
- For a user in 77084, do not assume the center solely from city name; verify service-area fit.
